rationale: Clean Stage A2 implementation. Analyzer covers all four structural sink patterns with proper type-checker resolution (RunOptions detected via package suffix + transitive embedding; mcpContent via type identity), constant-string exemption, and both above-line and inline allow-annotation forms with non-empty reason validation. Wired into lefthook pre-commit (staged-file scoped) and CI (full-tree). No scope creep into existing call sites, as instructed.
